title: VimFu — z{height} Enter
description: z{height} Enter sets the current split window height. Split first, then resize exactly how you want.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Z followed by a number and Enter sets the current window height. This only works when you have splits.
Two equal panes. Now type Z twelve Enter to make this pane twelve lines tall.
The top pane grew to twelve lines. The bottom pane shrank to fit.
Just four lines. The bottom pane got most of the space.
Control W equals to even them out.
Z height Enter. Resize any split pane to exactly the height you want.
